zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Touchet於1421年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利時，她的父親James Touchet 5th Baron Audley24歲，母親Margaret de Ros23歲。她和Sir Thomas Dutton至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1503年11月13日在英國英格蘭爾達頓享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Touchet于1421年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利时，她的父亲James Touchet 5th Baron Audley24岁，母亲Margaret de Ros23岁。她和Sir Thomas Dutton至少有3个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1503年11月13日在英国英格兰爾達頓享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Touchet was born in 1421, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Touchet 5th Baron Audley, was 24 and her mother, Margaret de Ros, was 23. She had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Sir Thomas Dutton. She died on 13 November 1503, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Touchet est née en 1421, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Touchet 5th Baron Audley, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Ros, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Sir Thomas Dutton. Elle est décédée le 13 novembre 1503, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Touchet 1421 in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Touchet 5th Baron Audley 24 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Ros 23. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas Dutton mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. November 1503 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Touchet è nata il nel 1421 nel Audley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Touchet 5th Baron Audley, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Ros, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie con Sir Thomas Dutton. Morì il 13 novembre 1503, nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Touchetが1421年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーで生まれた時，父James Touchet 5th Baron Audleyは24歳，母Margaret de Rosは23歳であった。彼女はSir Thomas Duttonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1503年11月13日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Touchet(이)가 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Touchet 5th Baron Audley(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Ros(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas Dutton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 11월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Touchet nasceu em 1421, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Touchet 5th Baron Audley, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Ros, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas com Sir Thomas Dutton. Ela faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1503, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Touchet родилась в 1421 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Touchet 5th Baron Audley было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Ros, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей от Sir Thomas Dutton. Она умерла 13 ноября 1503 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Touchet nació en 1421, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, James Touchet 5th Baron Audley, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret de Ros, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas con Sir Thomas Dutton. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1503, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
